3126860.name: Legends of Kailrate
3126860.description:
Discover the work of passionate developers and step into the skin of Kailrate. Help him fight swiftly against the enemies that constantly attack him. But be careful legends, bosses can also attack you, as they are part of the same clan. Some of them are extremely dangerous, like Tharnaxar, the Usurper of Realms.

Game Features:
1 game mode.
No timer, just a Wave system allowing the game to be infinite.
Many parameters are set up allowing game optimization, adaptable graphics, resolution, FPS display management, WSAD/ZQSD keyboard-mouse management.

In-Game Features:
Real-time ranking of the game's high scores.
Xbox/PlayStation controller supported
Ability to show or hide current challenges.
EXP level increases when you kill enemies and complete challenges (Up to 5000 EXP for bosses and between 10 and 50 EXP for enemies)
Sounds and SFX are played during different events.




Discover the characters and bosses:

Kailrate: The main character, your hero.


The Draconians: Enemies that come from the same location as the dragons.


Tharnaxar: A formidable dragon, the Usurper of Realms, capable of dominating entire realms.


Dreadhar: A sinister dragon, the Terror Bringer, spreading relentless terror in its wake.


Nexorath: A nightmarish dragon, the Soul Eater, feeding on the souls of its victims.


Nyxalor: A terrifying dragon, the Living Nightmare, plunging its enemies into living nightmares.
3126860.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
